attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WSNA.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY   
,WSNA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,WSNA.PD_ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD         
,WSNA.PD_SCAN_CREATION_DT           
,WSNA.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT        
,WSNA.PD_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD    
,WSNA.PD_SALES_REP_NUM              
,WSNA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        
,WSNA.PD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WSNA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT       
,WSNA.PD_SS_CD                      
,WSNA.PD_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME   
,WSNA.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT  
,WSNA.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_NAME    
,WSNA.SRC_RPTD_RBK_OTM_TERR_TYPE_CD 
,WSNA.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,WSNA.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,WSNA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,WSNA.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WSNA.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM 
,WSNA.PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD      
,WSNA.PD_SLS_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG 
,WSNA.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD 
,WSNA.START_TV_DTM                  
,WSNA.END_TV_DTM                    
,WSNA.UCRM_CASE_NUM     /* Below Columns added as part of NG */              
,WSNA.TRX_SPLIT_BU_ID               
,WSNA.SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT           
,WSNA.OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT          
,WSNA.SPLIT_1_OFFR_ATTRBTN_PCT      
,WSNA.SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT         
,WSNA.RTR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY             
,WSNA.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT               
,WSNA.SALES_MOTION_CD               
FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_OLY_RTNR WSNA
WHERE WSNA.DML_TYPE= 'I'
AND NOT  EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_NON_APLD_TRX_OLY_RTNR_TV NSNA
WHERE WSNA.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY =  NSNA.SALES_CR_ASSGN_NONAPPLD_KEY)
